description: Check auto-update status on session start

hooks.command: result=$(bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/debo-update-check 2>/dev/null || echo 'DEBO_AUTO_UPDATE=false'); echo "$result"; if echo "$result" | grep -q 'DEBO_AUTO_UPDATE=false'; then echo 'ACTION_REQUIRED: Ask the user if they want to enable auto-updates by running /debo:update-settings'; fi
